CustomField.description: The User assigned to decide on this request (the client-side approver). Set on submit from DeliveryHubSettings__c.ApproverUserIdTxt__c when configured; stamped with the deciding user on approve/decline when previously unassigned. Falls to null if the user is deleted; the request is preserved.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The user who needs to approve this request.
CustomField.label: Approver
